headline: Is Alphabet Inc. (GOOGL) One of the Best Forever Stocks to Buy on $85B Capital Raise?
summary: Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOGL) is one of the best forever stocks to buy, according to analysts. On June 5, Moody’s Ratings touted Alphabet Inc.’s (NASDAQ:GOOGL) move to raise $84.75 billion, affirming it as credit-positive. According to the ratings firm, the massive equity raise underscores Alphabet’s strong financial profile, which is capable of funding incremental investment through […]
